zh.Ashby-de-la-Zouche, Leicestershire, Engl: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelicia de Belmeis於1150年出生在英國史洛普爾通時，她的父親Phillip De Belmeis20歲，母親Maud de Meschines24歲。她於1174年與Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche在法國布列塔尼莫比韓越瑟林結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1190年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adelicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Delysia
meanings: Feminine form of the Late Latin name Delicius, a derivative of deliciae ‘delight’. Use as a given name seems to be a modern phenomenon; it is not found in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelicia de Belmeis was born in 1150, in Tong, Shropshire, England, her father, Phillip De Belmeis, was 20 and her mother, Maud de Meschines, was 24. She married Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche in 1174, in Josselin, Morbihan, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1190, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelicia de Belmeis est née en 1150, à Tong, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Phillip De Belmeis, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Maud de Meschines, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche en 1174, à Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1190, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Adelicia de Belmeis 1150 in Tong, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Phillip De Belmeis 20 und ihre Mutter Maud de Meschines 24. Sie hat 1174 in Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1190 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche nel 1174, nel Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1190, nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ko.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Adelicia de Belmeis(이)가 1150년 영국 슈럽실르 탕에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillip De Belmeis(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Meschines(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1174년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 조셀인에서 Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelicia de Belmeis nasceu em 1150, em Tong, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip De Belmeis, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Meschines, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche em 1174, em Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1190, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelicia de Belmeis родилась в 1150 г. в местности тунг, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Phillip De Belmeis было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Meschines, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche в 1174 г. в местности джосселинь, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1190 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

Se casó con Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche en 1174, en Josselin, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
